history_retention_days.description: Days to retain alert history (0 = unlimited)

AlertSettings.description: AlertSettings configures the alerting rules engine.

source.description: Legacy: migrated to Sources on load

streamtransport.description: preferred transport for audio streaming: "auto", "sse", or "ws"

name.description: Required: descriptive name like "Front Yard Mic"

samplerate.description: Capture rate in Hz (0 = default 48000; set 256000 for bat detectors)

gain.description: Input gain in dB (0 = no adjustment)

AudioSourceConfig.description: AudioSourceConfig represents a single audio capture device with per-source settings.

modelpath.description: path to BSG ONNX model file

BSGConfig.description: BSGConfig holds configuration for BSG regional bird models.

enabled.description: Global flag to enable or disable the entire backup system. If false, no backups (manual or scheduled) will occur.

debug.description: If true, enables detailed debug logging for backup operations.

encryption.description: If true, enables encryption for backup archives. Requires EncryptionKey to be set.

encryption_key.description: Base64-encoded encryption key used for AES-256-GCM encryption of backup archives. Must be kept secret and safe.

sanitize_config.description: If true, sensitive information (like passwords, API keys) will be removed from the configuration file copy that is included in the backup archive.

retention.description: Defines policies for how long and how many backups are kept.

targets.description: A list of configured backup targets (destinations) where backup archives will be stored.

schedules.description: A list of schedules (e.g., daily, weekly) that define when automatic backups should run.

operationtimeouts.description: OperationTimeouts defines timeouts for various backup operations

maxage.description: Duration string for the maximum age of backups to keep (e.g., "30d" for 30 days, "6m" for 6 months, "1y" for 1 year). Backups older than this may be deleted.

maxbackups.description: Maximum total number of backups to keep for a given source. If 0, no limit by count (only by age or MinBackups).

minbackups.description: Minimum number of recent backups to keep for a given source, regardless of their age. This ensures a baseline number of backups are always available.

enabled.description: If true, this specific schedule is active and backups will be attempted at the defined interval. (Valid: true or false)

hour.description: The hour of the day when the backup is scheduled to run. (Valid range: 0-23, where 0 is midnight and 23 is 11 PM)

minute.description: The minute of the hour when the backup is scheduled to run. (Valid range: 0-59)

weekday.description: For weekly schedules, the day of the week. Accepts: "Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday" (case-insensitive), or numeric: "0" (Sunday) through "6" (Saturday). Empty or ignored for daily schedules.

isweekly.description: If true, this schedule is weekly (runs on the specified Weekday at Hour:Minute). If false, it's a daily schedule (runs every day at Hour:Minute). (Valid: true or false)

BackupScheduleConfig.description: BackupScheduleConfig defines a single backup schedule

type.description: Specifies the type of the backup target (e.g., "local", "s3", "ftp", "sftp"). This determines the storage mechanism.

enabled.description: If true, this backup target will be used for storing backups. At least one target should be enabled for backups to be stored.

oneOf.description: A map of key-value pairs for target-specific settings. TODO: Consider using BackupTargetSettings interface for type safety after implementing custom YAML unmarshaling.

BackupTarget.description: BackupTarget defines settings for a backup target

showimage.description: whether to show a custom image

imagepath.description: relative path or URL to the banner image

showlocationmap.description: whether to show the location map

mapzoom.description: zoom level for the location map (default 11)

showpin.description: whether to show the location pin marker (default false)

mapexpandable.description: whether visitors can expand the map (default true)

BannerConfig.description: BannerConfig holds configuration for the dashboard banner element.

BasicAuth.description: BasicAuth holds settings for the password authentication

embeddingmodel.description: path to BirdNET v2.4 embeddings ONNX model

classifiermodel.description: path to bat species classifier ONNX model

labelpath.description: path to bat species labels file

nighttimeonly.description: restrict bat detection to nighttime (civil dusk to civil dawn)

falsepositivefilter.description: false positive filtering for bat detections (level 0-5)

BatConfig.description: BatConfig holds configuration for bat detection using BirdNET v2.4 embeddings.

threshold.description: threshold for prediction confidence to report

longitude.description: longitude of recording location for prediction filtering

latitude.description: latitude of recording location for prediction filtering

locationconfigured.description: true when location has been explicitly configured by the user

threads.description: number of CPU threads to use for analysis

modelpath.description: path to external model file (empty for embedded)

labelpath.description: path to external label file (empty for embedded)

usexnnpack.description: true to use XNNPACK delegate for inference acceleration

onnxruntimepath.description: path to ONNX Runtime shared library (required for ONNX models)

openvinopath.description: path to libopenvino_c shared library (OpenVINO image variants only)

threshold.description: threshold for prediction confidence for uploads

BirdweatherSettings.description: BirdweatherSettings contains settings for BirdWeather API integration.

CustomColors.description: CustomColors holds the user-defined primary and accent hex colors for the "custom" color scheme.

DailySummaryConfig.description: DailySummaryConfig holds configuration for the daily summary element.

summarylimit.description: limit for the number of species shown in the summary table

customcolors.description: custom scheme colors (used when colorScheme is "custom")

Dashboard.description: Dashboard contains settings for the web dashboard.

id.description: unique identifier (e.g., "daily-summary-0"); generated by migration if empty

DashboardElement.description: DashboardElement represents a single configurable element on the dashboard.

DashboardLayout.description: DashboardLayout defines the ordered list of elements displayed on the dashboard.

offset.description: hours to adjust daylight window; positive = shrink (lenient), negative = expand (strict)

species.description: species, families, orders, or genera to filter during daylight

DaylightFilterSettings.description: DaylightFilterSettings contains settings for the daylight species filter.

DetectionsGridConfig.description: DetectionsGridConfig holds configuration for the detections grid element.

DiskMonitorConfig.description: DiskMonitorConfig controls disk monitoring and which paths to check.

enabled.description: true to enable dog bark filter

confidence.description: confidence threshold for dog bark detection

remember.description: how long we should remember bark for filtering?

DogBarkFilterSettings.description: DogBarkFilterSettings contains settings for the dog bark filter.

validhours.description: number of hours to consider for dynamic threshold

DynamicThresholdSettings.description: DynamicThresholdSettings contains settings for dynamic threshold adjustment.

EBirdSettings.description: EBirdSettings contains settings for eBird API integration.

gain.description: Only used for certain filter types like Peaking

width.description: Only used for certain filter types like BandPass and BandReject

passes.description: Filter passes for added attenuation or gain

EqualizerFilter.description: EqualizerFilter is a struct for equalizer filter settings

enabled.description: global flag to enable/disable equalizer filters

EqualizerSettings.description: EqualizerSettings is a struct for audio EQ settings

debug.description: true to enable audio export debug

enabled.description: export audio clips containing indentified bird calls

path.description: path to audio clip export directory

type.description: audio file type, wav, mp3 or flac

gain.description: gain in dB for audio capture

ExtendedCaptureSettings.description: ExtendedCaptureSettings contains settings for extended capture mode.

FalsePositiveFilterSettings.description: FalsePositiveFilterSettings contains settings for false positive filtering aggressivity levels.

max_size.description: maximum size in MB before rotation (0 = disabled)

max_age.description: maximum age in days to keep rotated logs (0 = no limit)

max_rotated_files.description: maximum number of rotated log files to keep (0 = no limit)

HomeAssistantSettings.description: HomeAssistantSettings contains settings for Home Assistant MQTT auto-discovery.

allowinappelevation.description:
AllowInAppElevation enables the in-app sudo elevation ladder for native
imports of unreadable source data. Default true. When false, the UI only
offers copy-paste remediation and never prompts for a sudo password.

ImportConfig.description: ImportConfig controls the BirdNET-Pi import feature behavior.

bitrate.description: bitrate for live stream in kbps

samplerate.description: sample rate for live stream in Hz

segmentlength.description: length of each segment in seconds

LogDeduplicationSettings.description: LogDeduplicationSettings contains settings for log deduplication

level.description: debug, info, warn, error (deprecated, use DefaultLevel)

file.description: optional log file path (deprecated, use FileOutput)

debug_webhooks.description: if true, logs full webhook details (headers, body, etc.)

default_level.description: default log level for all modules

LowMemoryConfig.description: LowMemoryConfig is the manual override for the runtime memory policy.

MQTTSettings.description: MQTTSettings contains settings for MQTT integration.

enabled.description: true to enable TLS (auto-detected from broker URL)

insecureskipverify.description: true to skip certificate verification (for self-signed certs)

cacert.description: path to CA certificate file (managed internally)

clientcert.description: path to client certificate file (managed internally)

clientkey.description: path to client key file (managed internally)

MQTTTLSSettings.description: MQTTTLSSettings contains TLS/SSL configuration for secure MQTT connections

enabled.description: list of model IDs to load (e.g., "birdnet", "perch_v2")

directory.description: base directory for downloaded model files

installed.description: list of installed model IDs managed by the model gallery

ModelsConfig.description: ModelsConfig holds global model enablement and management settings.

file_path.description: dedicated file path for this module

level.description: log level override for this module

max_size.description: maximum size in MB before rotation (0 = use FileOutput default)

max_age.description: maximum age in days (0 = use FileOutput default)

max_rotated_files.description: maximum number of rotated files (0 = use FileOutput default)

compress.description: compress rotated logs (nil = use FileOutput default)

enabled.description: true to enable system resource monitoring

checkinterval.description: interval in seconds between resource checks

MonitoringSettings.description: MonitoringSettings controls system resource metric collection.

NewSpeciesTemplate.description: NewSpeciesTemplate contains templates for new species detection notifications.

NormalizationSettings.description: NormalizationSettings contains audio normalization configuration based on EBU R128 standard

NotificationConfig.description: NotificationConfig is the root for notification-specific settings.

NotificationTemplates.description: NotificationTemplates contains customizable notification message templates.

redirectUri.description: OAuth2 redirect URI (optional, auto-generated if empty)

userId.description: Allowed user ID/email for this provider

issuerUrl.description: OIDC issuer/discovery URL (required when provider is "oidc")

scopes.description: Custom OAuth scopes (OIDC default: openid, profile, email)

OAuthProviderConfig.description: OAuthProviderConfig holds settings for a single OAuth2 provider in the new array-based format.

enabled.description: true to enable OpenWeather integration, for legacy support

units.description: units of measurement: standard, metric, or imperial

OpenWeatherSettings.description: OpenWeatherSettings contains settings for OpenWeather integration.

modelpath.description: path to Perch v2 ONNX model file

labelpath.description: path to Perch v2 label CSV file

PerchConfig.description: PerchConfig holds configuration for the Google Perch v2 model.

PrivacyFilterSettings.description: PrivacyFilterSettings contains settings for the privacy filter.

liveaudio.description: allow unauthenticated users to start/listen to live audio streams

PublicAccess.description: PublicAccess defines which features are accessible without authentication.

PushFilterConfig.description: PushFilterConfig limits which notifications a provider receives.

PushProviderConfig.description: PushProviderConfig configures a single push provider instance.

PushSettings.description: PushSettings controls global push delivery and provider list.

startOffset.description: minutes relative to start event (positive = after, negative = before)

endOffset.description: minutes relative to end event (positive = after, negative = before)

QuietHoursConfig.description: QuietHoursConfig defines a time window during which an audio source is stopped to reduce CPU usage when birds are unlikely to be active.

RTSPHealthSettings.description: RTSPHealthSettings contains settings for RTSP stream health monitoring.

urls.description: Legacy: accepts old format, migrated on load

transport.description: Legacy: global default, migrated on load

RTSPSettings.description: RTSPSettings contains settings for audio streaming (supports multiple protocols).

model.description: range filter model version: "legacy" for v1, "v3" for geomodel v3.0, or empty/default for v2

modelpath.description: path to external meta model file (empty for embedded)

labelspath.description: path to geomodel labels file (required when geomodel differs from classifier labels)

passunmappedspecies.description: true to pass through species absent from geomodel (score 1.0); false to filter them out (score 0.0)

RangeFilterSettings.description: RangeFilterSettings contains settings for the range filter

enabled.description: show the rare-species highlight icon on detections

threshold.description: occurrence probability (0-1) at or below which a detection is flagged rare

RarityHighlight.description: RarityHighlight controls highlighting of detections whose geomodel occurrence probability is at or below Threshold (a "rare" sighting for the configured location and time of year).

interval.description: minimum interval between log messages in seconds

processingtime.description: true to report processing time for each prediction

species.description: Custom thresholds and actions for species

extendedcapture.description: Extended capture for long calling species

RealtimeSettings.description: RealtimeSettings contains all settings related to realtime processing.

enabled.description: true to enable monitoring for this resource

ResourceEnabled.description: ResourceEnabled controls whether a resource type is monitored.

maxage.description: maximum age of audio clips to keep

maxusage.description: maximum disk usage percentage before cleanup

minclips.description: minimum number of clips per species to keep

initialdelay.description: initial delay before first retry in seconds

maxdelay.description: maximum delay between retries in seconds

RetrySettings.description: RetrySettings contains common settings for retry mechanisms

Season.description: Season defines the start date for a season

windowdays.description: Days to show "new this season" indicator (default: 21)

SeasonalTrackingSettings.description: SeasonalTrackingSettings contains settings for tracking first arrivals each season

baseurl.description:
BaseURL is the complete external URL for this instance, including
scheme, host, and optional port (e.g., "https://birdnet.example.com:5500").
Used for generating OAuth redirect URLs and notification links.
Takes precedence over Host when set.
Can be overridden with BIRDNET_URL environment variable.
NOTE: This field is prepared for future implementation (issue #1462)

host.description:
Host is the primary hostname used for TLS certificates,
OAuth redirect URLs, and notification link generation.
Required when using AutoTLS or authentication providers.
Also used to generate URLs in push notifications - set this
to your public hostname when using a reverse proxy.
Can be overridden with BIRDNET_HOST environment variable.

autoTls.description:
Deprecated: AutoTLS is replaced by TLSMode. Kept for backward-compatible
config migration. Will be removed in a future version.

tlsMode.description:
TLSMode controls TLS certificate management. Valid values:
  "" (none)      - TLS disabled
  "autotls"      - automatic via Let's Encrypt
  "manual"       - user-provided certificates
  "selfsigned"   - auto-generated self-signed certificates

selfSignedValidity.description:
SelfSignedValidity is the validity duration for self-signed certificates.
Uses Go duration format with day/month suffixes (e.g., "365d", "1y").

trustedproxies.description:
TrustedProxies lists reverse proxies (CIDR ranges or bare IPs) whose
forwarded client-IP headers (CF-Connecting-IP, X-Forwarded-For, X-Real-IP)
may be trusted. Loopback, link-local, and private (RFC1918/ULA) peers are always
trusted in addition to these, so a default port-forwarded install and the
common local cloudflared topology work without configuration. When the
immediate peer is not trusted, forwarded headers are ignored and the real
connection address is used, preventing source-IP spoofing on a directly
exposed instance. The reserved value "cloudflare" (TrustedProxyCloudflarePreset)
expands to Cloudflare's published edge ranges. Hot-reloadable.

privatemode.description:
PrivateMode, when true, requires the user to authenticate before any
UI data is shown. Enforcement lives at the v2 API data layer, which
returns 401 to unauthenticated requests; the public SPA shell is still
served so it can render a login form instead of the dashboard,
detections, analytics, search, about, and notifications views. Settings
and system routes are additionally auth-gated at the HTTP layer.
PublicAccess.LiveAudio still applies independently.
Default is false to preserve guest-friendly upstream behavior.

oauthProviders.description:
OAuthProviders is the new array-based OAuth configuration.
This is the preferred format for configuring OAuth providers.

googleAuth.description:
Legacy OAuth fields - kept for backwards compatibility.
These are migrated to OAuthProviders on startup and ignored thereafter.
Will be removed in a future version.

Security.description: SecurityConfig handles all security-related settings and validations for the application, including authentication, TLS, and access control.

enabled.description: true to enable Sentry error tracking (opt-in)

debug.description: true to enable transparent telemetry logging

SentrySettings.description: SentrySettings contains settings for Sentry error tracking

lowmemory.description: Low-memory mode override (auto/on/off) for constrained systems

oneOf.description: Optional scientific-name synonym overrides merged with built-ins

SocialProvider.description: SocialProvider holds settings for an OAuth2 identity provider

enabled.description: true to enable sound level monitoring

debug.description: true to enable debug logging for sound level monitoring

debug_realtime_logging.description: true to log debug messages for every realtime update, false to log only at configured interval

SoundLevelSettings.description: AudioSettings contains settings for audio processing and export.

command.description: Path to the command to execute

executeDefaults.description: Whether to also execute default actions

SpeciesAction.description: SpeciesAction represents a single action configuration

interval.description: Custom interval in seconds (0 = use default)

SpeciesConfig.description: SpeciesConfig represents configuration for a specific species

enabled.description: true to enable new species tracking

SpeciesTrackingSettings.description: SpeciesTrackingSettings contains settings for tracking new species

enabled.description: DEPRECATED: Use Mode instead. Kept for backward compatibility (true = "prerender", false = "auto")

size.description: Default size for all modes (see recommendations below)

raw.description: Generate raw spectrogram without axes/legend (default: true)

SpectrogramPreRender.description: SpectrogramPreRender contains settings for spectrogram generation modes.

enabled.description: true when the configured stream should be active

type.description: Stream type: rtsp, http, hls, rtmp, udp

channelMode.description: Channel handling: downmix, left, or right

gain.description: Input gain in dB (0 = no adjustment)

StreamConfig.description: StreamConfig represents a single audio stream source

enabled.description: true to enable Prometheus compatible telemetry endpoint

listen.description: IP address and port to listen on

fallbackpolicy.description: fallback policy: "none", "all" - try all available providers if preferred fails

cvthreshold.description: detections with US frame CV below this are tagged unlikely

fftsize.description: FFT window size in samples (must be power of 2)

frequencysplithz.description: boundary between audible and ultrasonic bands in Hz

UltrasonicFilterConfig.description: UltrasonicFilterConfig controls the post-detection ultrasonic validation filter for bat detections.

VideoEmbedConfig.description: VideoEmbedConfig holds configuration for the YouTube video embed element.

WatchdogSettings.description: WatchdogSettings holds user-tunable parameters for the audio liveness watchdog.

pollinterval.description: weather data polling interval in minutes

allowembedding.description: true to allow embedding in iframes (e.g., Home Assistant)

valuefile.description: Path to file containing header value

WebhookAuthConfig.description: WebhookAuthConfig configures authentication for webhook requests.

WebhookEndpointConfig.description: WebhookEndpointConfig configures a single webhook endpoint.

WundergroundSettings.description: WundergroundSettings contains settings for WeatherUnderground integration.

resetmonth.description: Month to reset yearly tracking (1=January, default: 1)

windowdays.description: Days to show "new this year" indicator (default: 30)

YearlyTrackingSettings.description: YearlyTrackingSettings contains settings for tracking first arrivals each year

title: BirdNET-Go Configuration
description: Configuration schema for BirdNET-Go's config.yaml file.
